notes: Each mob death applies a 4s stacking party DoT (~1% party HP/stack/s)
Each mob death grants surviving pack +15% HP and damage
Eruption under a random character every ~10s on trash
Dead mobs leave heal pools; mobs standing in them heal 5% HP/s
Ghost spawns on each mob death and attacks the lowest-output character
Mobs below 30% HP enrage, gaining +25% haste (attack faster) until death
Undead catacombs beneath a fallen city
+12% damage while your focus target is below 30% HP
+20% damage when 2 or fewer enemies remain (single-target / boss)
+22% damage while 3 or more enemies are up (AoE / trash)
+16% damage while your focus target is below 50% HP (spike the kill)
+10% damage while 3 or more enemies are up (Kill Order)
